## 🛑 Prerequisites
This repository establishes the guardrail standards across three core domains: Infrastructure, Autonomous Driving, and SCM. 
Before submitting a proposal, you are strictly required to review and analyze our 3-category benchmark data and the `POST-LAUNCH LOG (White Surge Live Warning Log)` located at the bottom of the main branch.

Please note that generic business pitches or proposals without prior technical verification/proof-of-concept (PoC) will be closed immediately without feedback.

---

### 1. Entity Information
* **Organization / Company Name:**
* **Core Architecture & Domain:** (Select or integrate: Infrastructure / Autonomous Driving / SCM)
* **Primary Technical Contact (GitHub ID / Email):**

### 2. Core Contribution & Extension Strategy
> *Please propose tangible resources or methodologies that can enhance our benchmark system or mitigate risks in production environments.*
* **Core Capabilities/Resources Provided by Your Entity (e.g., Compute Resources, Edge Datasets, Core Algorithms):**
* **How will your technology mitigate or counterbalance the "White Surge" risk identified in our `POST-LAUNCH LOG`?:**

### 3. Technical Verification & Metrics
* **Current Guardrail Success/Pass Rate of Your System (Mishap Rate):**
* **Expected Quantitative Improvement Metrics upon integrating this guardrail system:**

### 4. Compliance & Acknowledgement
- [ ] Does your organization agree to fully comply with the security and safety guardrail protocols of this project? (Y/N)
